message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title US004 – As Administrator, I want to search for users

actor "Administrator" as Admin
participant "SearchUsersByParamsRoute" as Route
participant "inDto : SearchUserDto" as InDto
participant "UsersController" as Controller
participant "SearchUsersByParamsService" as Service
participant "SystemUserRepo" as UserRepo
participant "UserProfileRepo" as ProfileRepo
participant "usersFound : List<SystemUser>" as UsersFound
participant "usersFoundDto : List<UserDto>" as UsersFoundDto
participant "user : SystemUser" as User
participant "SystemUserMapper" as Mapper
participant "userDto : OutputUserDto" as UserDto
participant "usersJson : ResponseEntity" as Json

Admin -> Route: 1 GET /users?name={name}&email={email}&profile={profile}&func={func}
note right of Admin: The parameters (name, email, profile and function) will be in the query of the request. At least, one of than must be typed or chosen.

activate Route
activate InDto
activate Controller

Route --> Controller: 2 searchUsersByTypedParams(inDto)
deactivate Route
deactivate InDto

Controller -> Service: 3 searchUsersByTypedParams(inDto)
activate Service

opt if the request has a profile
    Service -> ProfileRepo: 4 result : existsUserProfileId(profile)
    activate ProfileRepo
    deactivate ProfileRepo
end

alt depending on which params came from inputDto, the service class will invoke the respective method
    Service -> UserRepo: 5 findAllBy...()
    activate UserRepo
    UserRepo ..> UsersFound: 6 create()
    deactivate UserRepo
    UsersFound --> Service: 7 usersFound
end

Service -> UsersFoundDto: 8 create()
activate UsersFoundDto

loop for each user found at the list
    Service -> User: 9 model2Dto(user)
    activate User
    User -> Mapper: 10 create()
    activate Mapper
    Mapper ..> UserDto: 
    deactivate Mapper
    UserDto ..> Service: 11 userDto
    deactivate User
    Service -> UsersFoundDto: 12 addUserDto()
end

UsersFoundDto --> Controller: 13 usersFoundDto
deactivate UsersFoundDto
deactivate Service

Controller -> Json: 14 create(usersFoundDto)
activate Json
Json ..> Controller: 15 usersJson
deactivate Json

Controller --> Admin: 16 Show the list of user found by typed/chosen parameters
deactivate Controller

@enduml
```
